name: Ranger Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening and sugars until smooth.
2. Beat in the vanilla extract.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Add the oatmeal, corn flakes, coconut, pecans, and chocolate chips to the dry ingredients.
5. Combine the wet and dry ingredients using a spatula until all ingredients are evenly incorporated.
6. Drop by tablespoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 10 - 12 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit, or until lightly golden brown.
8. Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to a wire rack to cool completely.
